positive: A stylized, geometric illustration of a celestial owl perched on a crescent moon, designed for apparel printing. The owl should have a majestic, wise silhouette, rendered in deep indigo, sapphire blue, and metallic silver lines. The background is a deep, ethereal gradient of midnight blue and violet, filled with scattered constellation motifs, stylized nebulae in cool tones, and minimalist star clusters. The overall composition must be highly symmetrical, centrally focused, and utilize strong negative space for clean printing results. Clean line art meets Art Deco geometry. High contrast, pop art influence, vector illustration style, crisp digital art, volumetric lighting, 8k, centered.
